tasks.instruction: Choose the correct place to complete each sentence.

items.stem: I need to buy some medicine for my cold. I should go to the ___.
I want to borrow a book about dinosaurs. Let's go to the ___.
I need to send a parcel to my cousin in Krakow. I'll go to the ___.
Dad says the car needs fuel before our trip. We have to stop at the ___.
There's a fire in the building! Someone call the ___!
Mum's car broke down on the way to school. She called a mechanic at the ___.
